evidence_quotes.quote: Lately I heard they wanna look in to putting adds in games and publicity for products?
They took me game key and me game Off Steam account cuz the company considered is not making anough money for it and the game is called Evolve Stage 2.
But they took me money and after 4 years they decide to take me product away and I payd 60 Euros for it!

paragraphs.text: Good Day, We need law Suits to protect the customer in this industry and laws set in place for owning a product, if not games should have if they are online Expire Dates! So the customer know what gets for is money's worth. Why the companys are so toxic now, why they afraid of them customers who pays 80-100 Euros lately for a game, what's the problem? Why they don't agree having laws to protect the costumer ? BUT THEY AGREE TO TAKE OUR MONEY AND NOT ANSWER FOR ANYTHING? Lately I heard they wanna look in to putting adds in games and publicity for products? After paying 80-100 Euros to escape and relax for an hour to be bombarded with adds and publicity durning your gamaplay time? NO WE DONT NEED LAWS THEY, CAN DO WHAT EVER... THE ONLY INDUSTRY THAT BARELY HAVE LWAS TO ANSWER TO, OPEN ANY BUSSINESS TO SEE WHAT LAWS DOES TO YOU IF YOU DON'T RESPECT THE CUSTOMER! THEN THE COMPANY DIRECLY IS SANCTIONED BY THE LAWS IN PLACE! But seems gaming company's can do anything they desire, at any given time with the product you payd for from your pocket and no one should bother them for that. They took me game key and me game Off Steam account cuz the company considered is not making anough money for it and the game is called Evolve Stage 2. Guess what I payd for it and now I can't acees it or play it.The company don't wanna answer to any mail IV send them just with an automatic message telling me that the product is no longer AVAIABLE. But they took me money and after 4 years they decide to take me product away and I payd 60 Euros for it! WE NEED LAWS AND LAWSUITS AGAINST THIS COMPANYS TO PROTECT THE CUSTOMER. Best Regards.
